name: Humane AI Pin
short_description: A screenless, magnetically worn AI device with a camera, mics, and a laser projector for the palm.
long_description: A clothing-clipped wearable that tried to replace the phone screen with voice, a projected palm display, and an always-available assistant. Commercially short-lived (sales wound down in 2025), it remains a sharp reference point for ambient, screen-light body-worn AI.

images.caption: Humane AI Pin and charging case.
images.alt_text: A small white square Humane AI Pin device with a chrome edge and an illuminated multicolor Trust Light, resting on top of its rounded white charging case.

sources.title: Humane AI Pin
sources.access_notes: Official site; product later discontinued — see Open Questions.
